---
title: "RentProjectWIP"
author: "Yun W & Paige S"
date: today
format: pdf
output-file: "Group4ProjectWIP"
output-ext: "pdf"
editor: source
---
```{r 01}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
RentWIP <- read_csv("C:/Users/kongy/Downloads/apartment+for+rent+classified/apartments_for_rent_classified_10K/apartments_for_rent_classified_10K.csv")
```


```{r 02}
RentWIP <- read_delim(
  "C:/Users/kongy/Downloads/apartment+for+rent+classified/apartments_for_rent_classified_10K/apartments_for_rent_classified_10K.csv",
  delim = ";"
)
```


```{r 03}
RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  rename_with(tolower) #converts entries into all lowercase
head(RentWIP)
```


```{r 04}
RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  mutate(
    price = as.numeric(price),
    square_feet = as.numeric(square_feet),
    bathrooms = as.numeric(bathrooms),
    bedrooms = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(bedrooms))
  ) #converts these columns into numerical values
```



```{r 05}
RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  mutate(
    title = str_squish(str_to_sentence(title)),
    body = str_squish(body),
    amenities = str_squish(str_to_lower(amenities))
  ) 
  RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  mutate(
    pets_allowed = as.factor(pets_allowed),
    state = as.factor(state),
    cityname = as.factor(cityname),
    fee = as.factor(fee))
    RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_to_lower))
```


```{r 06}
RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  mutate(
    pets_allowed = case_when(
      pets_allowed == "Cats,Dogs" ~ "cat,dog",
      pets_allowed == "None" ~ "None",
      TRUE ~ "None"
    )
  )
```


```{r 07}
RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  mutate(
    amenities = case_when(
      amenities == "null" ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ amenities)
  )


```

```{r 08}
unique(RentWIP$price_type)
RentWIP <- RentWIP %>%
  mutate(
    monthly_price = case_when(
      price_type == "monthly" ~ price,
      price_type == "weekly" ~ price * 4.33,
      price_type == "monthly|weekly" ~ price,  
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
```


```{r 09}
mean_sqft  <- mean(RentWIP$square_feet, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_price <- mean(RentWIP$monthly_price, na.rm = TRUE)
ggplot(RentWIP, aes(x = square_feet, y = monthly_price)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "pink") +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(mean_sqft - 500, mean_sqft + 500),
    ylim = c(mean_price - 1000, mean_price + 1000)
  )
```


```{r 10}
state_count <- RentWIP %>%
  filter(state != "null") %>%
  count(state)
avg_count <- mean(state_count$n)
avg_count
```


```{r 11}
valid_states <- state_count %>%
  filter(n >= avg_count) %>%
  pull(state)
exp_states <- RentWIP %>%
  filter(state %in% valid_states) %>%
  group_by(state) %>%
  summarize(avg_monthly_price = mean(monthly_price, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_monthly_price)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 25)
```



```{r 12}
ggplot(exp_states, aes(x = reorder(state, avg_monthly_price),
                         y = avg_monthly_price)) +
  geom_col(fill = "brown") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 25 Most Expensive States to Rent",
    x = "State",
    y = "Average Monthly Rent ($)"
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```


```{r 13}
city_count <- RentWIP %>%
  filter(cityname != "null") %>%
  count(cityname)
avg_citycount <- mean(city_count$n)
avg_citycount
```


```{r 14}
valid_cities <- city_count %>%
  filter(n >= avg_citycount) %>%
  pull(cityname)
exp_cities <- RentWIP %>%
  filter(cityname %in% valid_cities) %>%
  group_by(cityname)

```


```{r 15}
city_summary <- exp_cities %>%
  summarize(
    avg_price = mean(price, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_sqft = mean(square_feet, na.rm = TRUE),
    listings = n()
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_price))
city_summary
```
